note: Pew Research-based priors for language fallback. Applied in Stage 2 of BioClassifier when post language is non-English and bio keyword matching yields no signal. CRITICAL: posts tagged inference_method=language_prior are excluded from both mean mu and covariance Sigma_Delta estimation — used as held-out validation only.

sources.hispanic: Pew Research Center 2023, Hispanic Americans Today
sources.asian_american: Pew Research Center 2023, Asian Americans and Religion

spanish.note: Spanish-language posts assumed predominantly Latino; religion from Pew 2023 Hispanic Americans survey

korean.note: Korean-language posts assumed predominantly Korean-American; high Protestant share from Pew 2023 Asian Americans survey

chinese.note: Chinese-language posts assumed predominantly Chinese-American; high secular share from Pew 2023 Asian Americans survey

arabic.note: Arabic speakers are racially and religiously diverse; conservative prior. Muslim majority from Pew 2017 U.S. Muslims report
